text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, just one of my favorite hand creams.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's not particularly popular, but I haven't been
able to get another since it went out of stock last
week.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I recommended the same product to a darling
pony last week. I wonder if she managed to buy
one.
choice_data_list: Maybe it's sold out because you recommended it to her.

text_block_list.text:
But indeed, that was why. All of Fuji Kiseki's fans
rushed to buy the same hand cream, leaving her
hands dry and flaky for a while.
